purpose: Score generated portrait outputs for acceptance, attach structured review notes, and separate publishable generations from weak or malformed outputs before gallery delivery.

endpoints.description: Judge a generated portrait result and return a score plus publication recommendation.

sidecar_specification.purpose: Judge generated portrait outputs before publication or bundle delivery.

agent_usage.when_to_use: Use after generation completes and before images are published to a gallery, bundled for download, or marked successful in a workflow.
agent_usage.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a user-facing content moderation product, copyright detector, or final purchase decision system.
agent_usage.example_workflow: 1) Receive a completed generation id. 2) Call /generations/judge. 3) Publish only when the decision is accept or review policies allow it.

failure_modes.condition: Generation asset is missing or scoring cannot produce a usable result
failure_modes.recovery: Regenerate the asset or re-run judgment after the generation artifact becomes available

forbidden_behaviors.description: Must not write outside declared scope
Must not make external network calls

agent_notes.implementation_hint: Accept a generation identifier, compute or ingest review signals, store a numeric score with structured notes, and expose an explicit accept or reject decision for downstream gallery modules.
agent_notes.known_gotchas: Judgment modules often drift into moderation or ranking; keep this module focused on post-generation quality acceptance for portrait-like outputs.
agent_notes.preferred_approach: Return both a score and a decision so downstream workflows can set their own publication thresholds.
agent_notes.avoid_approach: Do not bundle storage, gallery publishing, or payment release into the judgment module.
